data.general: Be cautious in your financial dealings as Mars in the 1st house may lead to impulsive decisions, while Sun in the 2nd house can cause mood swings affecting your spending habits. Try to maintain a balance between your emotional and rational side. A new opportunity may arise in your career, but it's essential to weigh the pros and cons carefully.
data.luck: Your luck is moderately favorable, but it's crucial to be mindful of your emotions and not let them cloud your judgment.
data.scope: This period is ideal for assessing your financial goals and making necessary adjustments. It's also a good time to reassess your career goals and make strategic decisions.
data.study: With Mercury in the 2nd house, your communication skills may improve, and you may find it easier to express your ideas. However, be cautious not to get too caught up in intellectual pursuits, as it may lead to neglect of other important aspects of your life.
data.love: Romantic relationships may be put to the test due to the Sun's influence in the 2nd house, causing mood swings and emotional instability. It's essential to communicate openly and honestly with your partner to resolve any issues.
data.travel: Travel plans may be put on hold or delayed due to unforeseen circumstances. It's essential to be patient and flexible with your travel plans.
